calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-27-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Continued To Sep-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Helen Lee Greenberg, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois, (415-438-6689), for Darwin Tejada, Defendant and moving party.
Stephanie A. Foster, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group, (415-318-5709), for Alexandra Dukes, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Prior to the hearing, the Court announces its tentative ruling overruling Defendant's demurrer and sustaining the Plaintiff's objection to Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice.

Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as as follows: DEFENDANT DARWIN TEJADA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Order is signed after the hearing. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Helen Lee Greenberg, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois, (415-438-6689), for Darwin Tejada, Defendant and moving party.
Stephanie A. Foster, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group, (415-318-5709), for Alexandra Dukes, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Prior to the hearing, the Court announces its tentative ruling denying Defendant's motion and sustaining the Plaintiff's objection to Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice.

Court having reviewed the pleadings adopts the tentative ruling as as follows: DEFENDANT DARWIN TEJADA's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs' Complaint is DENIED. Order is signed after the hearing. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Continued To Jun-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DARWIN TEJADA'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint is continued to June 29, 2015 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Continued To Jun-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DARWIN TEJADA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to June 29, 2015 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported (D501)
